docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LANGMAN, AMY

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-14-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-20-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGMAN, AMY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1278 MARKET ST. #420 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-28-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT. WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PLTF. ARISING FROM THIS CASE AND WAIVES POF CIV. CDE. 1542. AMY LANGMAN SOLE OCCUPANT OF PREM. PRPTY. LEFT ON PREM. TO BE DISPOSED OF AS PLTF. SEES FIT. IF DEFT. TURNS KEYS OVER BY 12 NOON ON 9/28/99 PLTF. TO VACATE JDGMT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. NO STAYS. SEE MORE.
